.planning\\codebase\\ARCHITECTURE.md.summary: System architecture documentation including high-level diagrams and component descriptions.

backend\\src\\backend\\voice\\groq_llm.p.summary: Custom GroqLLM implementation for voice interaction. Handles streaming completions from Groq models.

backend\\src\\backend\\voice\\orchestrat.summary: Voice session orchestrator. Manages the lifecycle of voice calls and agent interactions.

backend\\voice_agent\\config.py.summary: Environment variable loader and validator for the voice agent. Manages API keys for Stream, Groq, Deepgram, and ElevenLabs.

backend\\voice_agent\\main.py.summary: Production entry point for the voice agent. Uses AgentLauncher and Runner to orchestrate WebRTC call joining, agent creation, and serving the FastAPI application.

backend\\voice_agent\\providers\\llm.py.summary: Custom GroqLLM implementation. Handles streaming responses from Groq API (llama-3.3-70b) and emits LLMResponseChunkEvents.

CHANGELOG.md.summary: Master record of project changes following Keep a Changelog format.

frontend\\src\\components\\InputArea.tsx.summary: Core UI component for user interaction. Supports text input, voice session toggling, and real-time visual feedback (waveform).

frontend\\src\\contexts\\NexusContext.ts.summary: Central React context for managing global application state, including chat, voice sessions, and API configurations.
